name: Secure S3 Static Website
description: Production-ready S3 static website hosting with server-side encryption, access logging, versioning, and optional CloudFront CDN distribution. Ideal for hosting SPAs, documentation sites, and marketing pages.
architectureSummary: Creates an S3 bucket configured for static website hosting with a separate logging bucket, server-side encryption (AES-256), optional versioning, and a bucket policy for public read access. Version 1.1.0 adds a CloudFront distribution with Origin Access Identity for secure S3 access, optional ACM certificate for custom domains, and automatic HTTP-to-HTTPS redirection.
securityNotes: All buckets use server-side encryption (AES-256). Public access is restricted to the website bucket only via explicit bucket policy. The logging bucket blocks all public access. When using CloudFront (v1.1.0), S3 public access is replaced with Origin Access Identity for tighter security. Versioning is enabled by default to protect against accidental deletions.

versions.changelog: Initial release with S3 static website hosting, server-side encryption, access logging, versioning, and public read bucket policy.

inputs.name: project_name
inputs.label: Project Name
inputs.description: A unique name for the project, used in resource naming and tagging.

inputs.name: environment
inputs.label: Environment
inputs.description: The deployment environment (e.g., dev, staging, production).

inputs.name: aws_region
inputs.label: AWS Region
inputs.description: The AWS region to deploy resources into.

inputs.name: domain_name
inputs.label: Custom Domain Name
inputs.description: Optional custom domain name for the static site (e.g., www.example.com). Leave empty to use the S3 website endpoint.

inputs.name: enable_versioning
inputs.label: Enable S3 Versioning
inputs.description: Enable versioning on the S3 bucket to protect against accidental deletions.

inputs.name: index_document
inputs.label: Index Document
inputs.description: The default index document for the website.

inputs.name: error_document
inputs.label: Error Document
inputs.description: The custom error document for the website.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.label: Additional Tags
inputs.description: Optional comma-separated key=value pairs for additional resource tags (e.g., team=frontend,cost-center=marketing).

outputs.name: website_bucket_name
outputs.description: The name of the S3 bucket hosting the static website.

outputs.name: website_bucket_arn
outputs.description: The ARN of the S3 website bucket.

outputs.name: logging_bucket_name
outputs.description: The name of the S3 access logging bucket.

versions.changelog: Added CloudFront distribution with Origin Access Identity, HTTP-to-HTTPS redirection, optional ACM certificate for custom domains, and CloudFront access logging. S3 bucket is no longer publicly accessible — all traffic is routed through CloudFront.

inputs.name: cloudfront_price_class
inputs.label: CloudFront Price Class
inputs.description: The CloudFront price class that determines edge location coverage. Lower price classes reduce cost but limit geographic distribution.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.label: Additional Tags
inputs.description: Optional comma-separated key=value pairs for additional resource tags (e.g., team=frontend,cost-center=marketing).

outputs.description: The name of the S3 bucket hosting the static website.

outputs.name: cloudfront_distribution_id
outputs.description: The ID of the CloudFront distribution.

outputs.description: The name of the S3 access logging bucket.
